name: Maine Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar.
2. Add the beaten eggs and beat well.
3. Mix the sour milk and soda together.
4. Add this mixture to the creamed ingredients.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients, vanilla, chopped apples, and nuts.
6. Pour into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
